info.description: When a customer orders online — update the status as you process it

delivery_address.description: Where to deliver (if they gave an address)

customer_notes.description: Anything the customer wrote in the notes box

order_status.description: Placed = new order · Paid = customer started MoMo payment · Pending / Completed = in progress or done · Cancelled = stock goes back

stock_deducted.description: Filled in automatically — true after stock has been removed for this order

subtotal.description: Total amount in RWF (before any changes)

what_they_ordered.description: List of products in this order
